description: A clear plastic jar with a red lid, labeled 'PC BLUE MENU Crunchy Peanut Butter'. The label has images of peanuts and text in English and French. The peanut butter is a light brown color.
A large white tub with a dark gray lid, labeled 'ÔTKO PRO Protein'. The label indicates 'Plain - Non-Fat' and '19g Protein'.
A clear plastic bag filled with a mixture of shredded cabbage (purple and white) and shredded carrots. The bag is sealed with a green plastic tie and a red clip.
A clear plastic bag containing several red and yellow apples. The bag is cinched at the top and appears to be tied shut.

A bar of milk chocolate with roasted hazelnuts. The packaging is predominantly white with gold lettering at the top and a purple section at the bottom. The text indicates 'MILK CHOCOLATE', 'ROASTED HAZELNUTS', and 'NOISSETTES GRILLÉES'. There is also a visual of a hazelnut and a piece of chocolate. The weight is indicated as '90 g'. The brand name appears to be 'Laura Secord'.
A bar of Laura Secord milk chocolate with roasted hazelnuts. The wrapper is white and purple. The weight is 90 g.
A bar of Laura Secord milk chocolate with roasted hazelnuts. The wrapper is white and purple. The weight is 90 g.
A bar of Laura Secord milk chocolate with roasted hazelnuts. The wrapper is white and purple. The weight is 90 g.
A white and purple box of milk chocolate with roasted hazelnuts. The brand name 'Golden' is visible at the top. The box is oriented vertically. Text in English and French is present on the packaging.
A white and purple box of milk chocolate with roasted hazelnuts. The brand name 'Golden' is visible at the top. The box is oriented vertically. Text in English and French is present on the packaging.
A can of Blue Menu Chickpeas. The can is silver with a blue and white label. The label features a bowl of chickpeas and text indicating '4g of fibre NO SALT ADDED'. The volume is 540 mL (19 fl oz).

A glass bottle of Santa Cruz Organic Pure Lemon Juice. The bottle is clear glass with a green cap. The label is yellow and white, featuring a lemon and text that reads 'SANTA CRUZ organic PURE LEMON JUICE'. The volume is 473 mL.

A can of Blue Menu Pois Chiches (Chickpeas in French). The can is silver with a blue and white label. The label features a bowl of chickpeas and text indicating '4g de fibres SANS SEL AJOUTÉ'. The volume is 540 mL (19 fl oz).
